title: External connector legacy gap remediation
goal: Close pre-pilot gaps in the external connector MVP vertical slice without adding a source-specific adapter.
in_scope: Landing-zone issue/report for skipped unsafe raw payloads
Durable tombstone registry and stale upsert protection
Queue status details for failed/dead-letter jobs
acceptance: Unsafe raw responses are not written to quarantine.
Expired runtime artifacts can be reported and cleaned by command.
Manifest includes connector version, timestamps, counts, errors, cursor state, retention class and issues path.
Delete envelopes append tombstones and stale upserts are rejected or skipped.
Queue status can show detailed failed/dead-letter jobs.
